qa_result.question: What is the most likely scenario where this conversation takes place?
options: A. The emperor interrogates and holds the involved officials accountable in the grand hall of the Ming Dynasty imperial palace
B. Relevant officials privately follow up on the case and pursue accountability in the official residence of the Minister of Revenue
C. Several imperial officials discuss official business privately in the private room of a restaurant in the capital city
qa_result.answer_text: The emperor interrogates and holds the involved officials accountable in the grand hall of the Ming Dynasty imperial palace
